# Fixture Minimal

A second hermetic fixture: a project caught mid-pipeline. It has run debrief and is in research,
with every later stage still pending, no decisions logged yet, no register, and no prototype. The
board must render this honestly — empty and partial states designed, not crashed.

## Recommended next step

Run `design-studio-research` to sweep the problem space, then verify the riskiest assumption.
